  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/pipeline/procurementagent/{pipelineId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Save procurement agent data for a program

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

>

  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the pipeline to save the procurement agent data into","in":"path","name":"pipelineId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"pipelineProcurementAgent":{"type":"string"},"pipelineProcurementAgentId":{"type":"string"},"procurementAgentId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"QatTempProcurementAgent"}}},"description":"The procurement agent data to save","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
